No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to eradicating poverty or its specific targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to health, well-being, or related services.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly fosters intellectual rigor, critical thinking, and speculation (Core Competency C), which are foundational skills for acquiring knowledge relevant to sustainable development (Target 4.7).
evidence: Develop a comprehensive understanding of foundational philosophical themes

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to energy access or renewable energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to economic growth, employment, or labor rights.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to infrastructure, industrialization, or technological innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course's focus on 'ethics' and 'moral obligations' provides a philosophical framework for understanding and potentially addressing issues of social inclusion and equal opportunity (Targets 10.2, 10.3).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to urban development, heritage, or public spaces.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to sustainable consumption, waste, or resource management.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to climate change or environmental action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly covers 'ethics,' 'moral obligations,' and 'valid reasoning,' which are foundational philosophical concepts for promoting justice (Target 16.3) and developing effective, accountable institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to global partnerships, financing, or technology transfer.
